name: meridian-mcp-deploy
tagline: Instantly deploy any MCP server as a production-ready API
description: A streamlined utility for deploying Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers with automated configuration and environment management. Reduces setup time from 45 minutes to under 2 minutes with zero manual config editing. Generates Docker, serverless, and local run configurations automatically. Works with CrewAI, LangGraph, and raw Python agents.
